problem.title: Maximum Twin Sum of A Linked List

approaches.title: Array-based value collection
approaches.summary: Traverse the linked list to collect node values in a vector, then compare mirrored positions to compute the maximum twin sum.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Initial vector-based solution that consumes the list while copying values into an array.

revisions.commitComment: copy approach again, but less copying
revisions.rawCommitSubject: rust 2130: copy approach again, but less copying
revisions.shortChangeSummary: Returns to the vector-based strategy while traversing by reference, avoiding node ownership movement.

approaches.title: Fast/slow split with list reversal
approaches.summary: Use fast and slow pointers to locate the midpoint, reverse the second half, and compare it with the first half.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Replaces the vector with midpoint detection and reversal of the second half for direct pairwise comparison.
